help-center.title: Help Center
help-center.excerpt: Setup, app, sharing, order, and care answers for MyFrame customers.
help-center.body:
Getting Started

Unbox MyFrame, power it on, keep it near Wi-Fi, install the mobile app, then pair and send your first photo.

Need Support?

Use the Contact Us form for order, logistics, or product questions. We reply at contact@myframe.ink.

Fast Help Paths

If you are setting up a frame, start with power, Wi-Fi, pairing, and a first test photo. If you are asking about an order, include your order number and the payment method you used. If you are asking about delivery, include the destination country or region and the email used at checkout.

Payment Help

MyFrame checkout can support Stripe card payments and PayPal when those gateways are enabled. The exact options visible to you depend on currency, region, and provider availability. Always complete payment from the official checkout page and wait for the success or confirmation screen before closing your browser tab.

  • Stripe / card checkout: supports eligible credit and debit cards through Stripe. Card details are processed by Stripe, not stored by MyFrame.
  • PayPal: lets eligible customers pay from a PayPal account or PayPal-supported flow where available.
  • Pending payment: means the order exists but payment has not yet been confirmed by the provider.
  • Failed or cancelled payment: try again from checkout, use another supported method, or contact support with the order number.

Setup Help

Keep the frame close to the router during first setup. Confirm the Wi-Fi password, avoid captive networks that require a hotel or office login page, and restart the app if pairing does not continue. If a family member is setting up the frame for a parent, complete pairing before gifting when possible.

Photo Sharing Help

Invite only trusted family members. Send a small test photo first, then create albums or regular sharing habits. If photos do not appear, check app connection, device status, Wi-Fi signal, and whether the frame has recently synced.

Order and Delivery Help

For delivery questions, send support your order number, destination, checkout email, and any courier tracking number you received. Delivery estimates can change because of stock timing, customs, local holidays, weather, courier backlog, or address issues.

Product Video

A short walkthrough of sending photos and placing the frame at home.

Play Video

Buying MyFrame

What is MyFrame?

MyFrame is a connected family photo frame supported by mobile app and web tools. It helps families send photos to a home display without making parents manage another app.

How much does it cost?

Pricing depends on model and region. See the Pricing section on the homepage or the store checkout for current offers.

Are there monthly fees?

There is no required subscription for normal family photo frame use. Optional services, if added later, will be clearly disclosed before purchase.

Which payment methods do you support?

Checkout may support Stripe card payments, PayPal, and any additional active payment methods shown at checkout. Availability depends on region, gateway configuration, currency, and provider status.

Can I pay by credit or debit card?

Yes, when Stripe card checkout is active for your region. Stripe processes card details securely; MyFrame does not store full card numbers.

Can I pay with PayPal?

Yes, when PayPal is active at checkout. You may be redirected to PayPal or shown a PayPal checkout window depending on your browser and region.

Why is my payment still pending?

Some orders remain pending until the payment provider confirms completion. If you closed checkout early, cancelled the provider window, or the provider is reviewing the transaction, the order may not immediately show as paid.

Do you support cash on delivery?

Cash on delivery is only available if it appears as an active option at checkout for your destination. If it is not shown, please use one of the displayed online payment methods.

Setup and Use

Do elders need technical knowledge?

No. The experience is designed so family members can send photos remotely while the frame stays simple at home.

Can couples use MyFrame?

Yes. Invite your partner and share albums that matter to both of you.

Can it be given as a gift?

Yes. Many customers purchase MyFrame as a gift for parents and grandparents.

How do I pair the frame?

Power on the frame, keep it near Wi-Fi, open the MyFrame mobile app, and follow the pairing instructions. If a QR code or invite link is shown, scan or open it from the family member’s phone.

Can more than one person send photos?

Yes. Family members can be invited so trusted people can send photos to the same frame or album. The exact number and permission options may vary by model and app version.

What should I do if the frame does not connect?

Check Wi-Fi range, confirm the password, restart the frame, reopen the app, and try pairing again. If the problem continues, contact support with model, order number, phone type, and a short description of what you see on screen.

Privacy and Care

Are photos private?

Yes. MyFrame is built around private family sharing. See our Privacy Policy for details.

Is the screen comfortable?

The paper-like e-paper display is designed for calm viewing without harsh backlight.

Does it need frequent charging?

E-ink uses power mainly when the image changes, supporting long battery life depending on model and usage.

Can I remove a family member?

Where supported by the app, the account or frame owner can manage invited family members. Remove access for anyone who should no longer send or view photos.

How should I clean the frame?

Use a soft dry cloth. Avoid water, harsh cleaning chemicals, abrasive cloths, and direct spraying onto the display or ports.

Shipping and Orders

How long does delivery take?

Delivery timing depends on destination, stock, customs, courier performance, and holidays. Checkout and order emails may show the current delivery estimate.

Can I change my shipping address?

Contact support as soon as possible with your order number. Address changes may not be possible after fulfillment has started.

How do I get order help?

Use the Contact Us page and include your order number, email used at checkout, payment method, and the issue you need help with.

contact-us.title: Contact Us
contact-us.excerpt: Reach the MyFrame team for support, logistics and product questions.
contact-us.body:
Contact MyFrame

We are here to help.

Questions about products, orders, partnerships, or support? Send us a message and the MyFrame team will get back to you. You can also email contact@myframe.ink.

Hong Kong Headquarters

Visit Our Hong Kong Office

We are located in San Po Kong, Hong Kong, providing a strong base for international business, communication, and customer support.

Office Address
RM11, 13/F, BLK C WONG KING IND. BLD., 192-198 CHOI HUNG RD, SAN PO KONG, HONG KONG

Office Type
Headquarters and international business operations office.

View on Map

privacy-policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy-policy.excerpt: How MyFrame collects, uses, and protects personal data across our website, store, apps, support channels, and connected frames—including family content, cookies, and your rights.
privacy-policy.body:
Who we are

This Privacy Policy describes how MyFrame (“we”, “us”, “our”) collects, uses, stores, and shares personal information when you use our official website, online store, mobile applications, web tools, customer support channels, marketing communications, and connected MyFrame hardware products that work with those services (together, the “Services”).

MyFrame builds connected family photo frame products and companion software. Our approach is straightforward: family photos and household context deserve intentional protection, not repurposing for unrelated advertising. We collect what we reasonably need to run the Services, deliver orders, keep devices working reliably, and respond when you ask for help.

If you do not agree with this policy, please discontinue use of the Services. Continued use after we post updates means you accept the revised policy where permitted by law.

Scope and roles

Depending on your relationship with us, we may act as a controller or processor of personal information:

  • Website visitors and customers: we generally act as a controller for account, checkout, support, and marketing data you provide to us.
  • Family photo content: we process photos and album content you choose to upload or send through the product so that invited family members and the authorized frame can receive them. Access is governed by account settings and invitations.
  • Organizations: if you use MyFrame on behalf of a household, school, company, or other entity, you confirm you are authorized to share the relevant information.

Information we collect

We collect information in three main ways: you provide it, it is collected automatically when you use the Services, and we receive it from partners where needed to complete a transaction or delivery.

Account, contact, and identity

  • Name, email address, phone number, billing and shipping addresses, country or region, time zone, language preference, and similar contact fields you submit at checkout, in your profile, or in support messages.
  • Login identifiers such as email, device tokens, or session identifiers needed to keep you signed in securely across sessions where that feature exists.

Orders, payments, and logistics

  • Order details such as products purchased, quantities, currency, taxes where displayed, discounts, shipping method selection, and gift messages you choose to include.
  • Payment information: card and wallet transactions are handled by payment providers (for example Stripe or PayPal). We do not store full payment card numbers on our servers. We may receive limited payment metadata such as last four digits, brand, expiry where shown by the provider, payment status, and transaction references needed for reconciliation and support.
  • Delivery partners receive the information required to ship your package (for example recipient name, phone where required by courier rules, and address).

Device, app, and product telemetry

  • Frame and app identifiers needed for pairing, account linkage, software updates, diagnostics, and preventing abuse.
  • Connectivity-related signals such as Wi-Fi connection status summaries, firmware or app version, error codes, crash or performance logs where you have enabled diagnostic collection or where needed for security.
  • Basic technical data such as device type, operating system version, app build, screen size class, and localization settings used to render the interface correctly.

Photos, albums, and household content

  • Images, captions, albums, playlists, invites, and related metadata you choose to send through the Services for display on a frame or for storage in a family account.
  • Permissions relationships, such as which accounts are allowed to send or manage content for a given frame, based on product capabilities available in your app version.

Website usage, cookies, and similar technologies

  • Pages viewed, approximate referral source, session duration estimates, language and currency preferences, and security-related events (for example repeated failed logins) where logged.
  • Cookies, local storage, or similar technologies that keep your session stable, remember preferences, power shopping cart flows, or measure basic site performance. You can control many cookies through browser settings; required cookies may still be needed for checkout security.

Support and communications

  • Emails, chat transcripts where used, contact form content, troubleshooting screenshots or files you attach voluntarily, order references, and internal notes created to resolve your case.
  • Marketing preferences and subscription status where applicable.

Approximate location

We may derive approximate location (for example country or city level) from IP address or network information to localize pricing, language, estimated shipping options, fraud screening, or compliance workflows. We do not aim to provide continuous location tracking as a product feature.

Legal bases (where applicable)

If laws such as the GDPR apply, we rely on one or more of the following bases:

  • Contract: processing needed to create your account, take payment, ship products, or provide the features you requested.
  • Legitimate interests: securing the Services, improving reliability, understanding aggregate usage, preventing fraud, and communicating important non-marketing notices—balanced against your rights.
  • Consent: where we explicitly ask, for example optional marketing emails or optional analytics beyond essentials.
  • Legal obligation: tax, accounting, regulatory requests, or lawful court orders.

How we use information

We use personal information to:

  • Provide, operate, and improve the Services, including pairing, synchronization, album management, display on hardware, and account recovery workflows where available.
  • Process payments, prevent fraud, validate promotions, issue refunds when eligible, and maintain accurate ledgers.
  • Fulfill shipments, provide tracking communications when available, and coordinate returns or warranty workflows consistent with our policies.
  • Provide customer support, respond to legal requests, enforce our Terms of Service, and protect users from abuse or security threats.
  • Send operational messages about purchases, delivery, security, outages, policy updates, or product safety when necessary, even if you opted out of marketing.
  • Send optional marketing only where permitted and with workable opt-out.
  • Conduct internal analytics in aggregated or de-identified form where possible to understand feature performance and stability.

Family photos and private sharing

MyFrame is designed for private family sharing. We do not sell your family photos. We do not use your family photos to train generalized advertising models. Access to content is intended to follow account controls and invitation rules in the product experience.

You should upload and share only content that you have the rights and consent to share. If you invite another person to collaborate, they may be able to view, contribute, or manage content depending on the permissions granted by the product.

If you believe content was posted without authorization, contact us with details so we can review under applicable law and our policies.

How we share information

We share personal information only as needed with:

  • Service providers under contracts that limit use to providing services to us (for example hosting, email delivery, customer support tooling, payment processing, fraud tools, analytics, and security monitoring).
  • Shipping and logistics partners to deliver physical goods.
  • Professional advisors such as lawyers or accountants under confidentiality obligations.
  • Authorities when we believe disclosure is required by law, regulation, subpoena, or to protect rights, safety, or the integrity of the Services.
  • Business transfers such as a merger, acquisition, financing, or asset sale, where personal information may transfer as part of the transaction, subject to applicable notices.

Payment providers process payment data under their own privacy notices. We encourage you to read Stripe or PayPal policies when you choose those methods.

International transfers

MyFrame operates internationally with a base in Hong Kong SAR. Your information may be processed in Hong Kong and in other countries where we or our providers maintain facilities. When we transfer personal information across borders, we take steps we consider reasonable for that transfer path, including contractual safeguards where appropriate.

Retention

We keep personal information only as long as needed for the purposes above and as required by law:

  • Account and product usage data: retained while your account is active and for a reasonable period thereafter for recovery, disputes, or security.
  • Orders: transactional records may be kept longer for tax, accounting, and regulatory reasons.
  • Support tickets: retained to reference prior issues and training of support quality, unless deletion is requested earlier and permitted.
  • Family content: retained until you delete it, delete your account where that feature exists, or until retention policies communicated in the product apply.

When deletion is performed, residual copies may persist for a limited time in encrypted backups until those backups expire.

Security

We implement technical and organizational measures designed to protect personal information against unauthorized access, loss, or alteration. These measures may include encryption in transit, access controls, monitoring, and vendor reviews. No method of transmission or storage is perfectly secure; please use strong passwords and keep your devices updated.

Your rights and choices

Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, restrict, or port personal information, and to object to certain processing (including direct marketing where applicable). You may also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

To exercise rights, contact us using the details below. We may need to verify your identity before fulfilling requests. Some rights may be limited where we must retain records to complete transactions, secure our systems, or comply with law.

You may opt out of marketing emails using the unsubscribe link in those messages where provided. Operational messages may continue where necessary.

Children

MyFrame is designed for families, but accounts that purchase products or bind payment methods should be operated by adults. Parents and guardians decide what imagery is appropriate for their household. If you believe we have collected information from a child inappropriately, contact us so we can investigate and take appropriate action.

California residents (CPRA summary)

If California law applies, you may have additional rights to know, delete, and correct personal information, and to opt out of certain sharing for cross-context behavioral advertising where we engage in that activity. We do not knowingly sell personal information of minors under 16. For requests, use our contact channel below and include “California Privacy Request” in the subject line.

Changes to this policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will post the updated version on this page and revise the effective date when we do. If changes are material, we may provide additional notice as required by law or through the Services.

Contact us

Questions about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices: visit Contact Us or email contact@myframe.ink.

terms-of-service.title: Terms of Service
terms-of-service.excerpt: Legal terms for purchases, software license, user content, shipping, liability, acceptable use, and disputes for MyFrame websites, apps, checkout, and hardware.
terms-of-service.body:
Agreement to these terms

These Terms of Service (“Terms”) govern your access to and use of MyFrame websites, online stores, mobile applications, downloadable software that accompanies our products, customer support offerings, and connected MyFrame devices that operate with those services (collectively, the “Services”). By purchasing, downloading, installing, registering an account where available, browsing our sites, or otherwise using the Services, you agree to these Terms.

If you are entering into these Terms on behalf of a company, household, school, or other entity, you represent that you have authority to bind that entity and “you” will refer to that entity and its authorized users.

Our Privacy Policy explains how we collect and use personal information. The Privacy Policy is incorporated by reference into these Terms.

Eligibility and accounts

You must be able to form a legally binding contract in your jurisdiction to use the purchasing portions of the Services. If account registration exists for your product, you agree to provide accurate, current information and to keep credentials secure. You are responsible for activity under your account unless caused solely by our negligence.

You may not share credentials in ways that circumvent limits on authorized users, impersonate others, or attempt to probe, scan, or test the vulnerability of the Services without written permission.

Changes to the Services and these Terms

We may modify the Services or these Terms over time, including for security, legal, operational, or product reasons. When we update these Terms, we will post the revised version on this page and update the effective date. If changes are material, we may provide additional notice as permitted by law. Continued use after the effective date of changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms, except where applicable law requires a different consent mechanism.

Products, availability, and descriptions

MyFrame designs and sells connected family photo frame hardware and provides supporting software for pairing, synchronization, content management, and customer support.

We strive to present accurate descriptions, images, specifications, and compatibility data. However, electronics products evolve, regional SKUs may differ, and materials may be updated. Packaging or bezels may differ slightly from photographs. Specifications such as display technologies, connectivity options, battery expectations, supported formats, and invited-member limits may vary by model and firmware version. If a critical specification affects your purchase decision, confirm in checkout details or contact support before ordering.

Product availability, pricing, promotions, bundles, and shipping methods may change without prior notice except where a confirmed paid order already exists subject to the cancellation rules below.

Orders, pricing, taxes, and acceptance

When you place an order, you make an offer to purchase. We may accept or decline orders for operational, fraud-prevention, inventory, export-control, or reliability reasons. A contract is formed when we confirm acceptance, for example by sending an order confirmation email or beginning fulfillment, consistent with the practices stated in checkout.

Prices are shown in the currency selected where supported. You are responsible for applicable taxes, duties, import fees, or carrier charges that depend on your destination. Displayed totals may include estimates; final amounts are those shown at payment confirmation.

If we discover a clear pricing error that no reasonable customer would expect, we may cancel the order and refund any payment captured, or offer to re-issue at corrected pricing where lawful.

Shipping and delivery

Delivery dates and transit times are estimates and are not guaranteed. Delays may occur due to customs inspections, carrier capacity, weather, holidays, incomplete addresses, remote locations, or events outside our reasonable control. Title and risk of loss pass according to the incoterm or carrier terms shown in your shipment workflow where applicable.

You are responsible for providing a deliverable address and for complying with import rules in your country. If a shipment is returned because of an incorrect address or failure to receive, additional fees may apply for re-shipment.

Payments and fraud prevention

Supported payment methods may include credit and debit card processing, PayPal, or other providers shown at checkout. Payment processing is performed by third parties. You authorize us and our payment providers to charge your selected method for the authorized amount.

You represent that you are authorized to use the payment method. We may use fraud screening tools, verify identity, delay fulfillment, or cancel suspicious transactions. If a chargeback or dispute is filed, we may suspend fulfillment, close accounts linked to abuse, or pursue lawful remedies.

Returns, refunds, exchanges, and cancellations

Return eligibility depends on product condition, time window, regional law, and the policies communicated at purchase. Unless a longer period is required by mandatory local consumer law, hardware must generally be returned in original condition with included accessories where reasonably possible.

To start a return or exchange, contact support with your order number and reason. Do not ship high-value items without instructions; unauthorized returns may be rejected or delayed.

Digital items or prepaid shipping labels may be governed by separate rules where applicable. If you cancel before fulfillment begins where cancellation is supported, we will refund the purchase payment as permitted by your payment provider.

Software license and updates

Subject to these Terms, we grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use MyFrame software provided for your personal or authorized household use, solely in connection with genuine MyFrame hardware or services we provide.

You may not copy, modify, reverse engineer, decompile, or create derivative works from our software except where mandatory law permits; rent, lease, sell, or sublicense the software; or remove proprietary notices.

We may deploy automatic updates to apps, firmware, or configuration to maintain security, fix defects, or improve features. Some updates may be required for continued safe use.

User content and acceptable use

You retain ownership of photos and other content you upload, subject to the license below. You represent that you have rights and, where needed, consent to share that content through the Services.

You grant MyFrame a worldwide, royalty-free license to host, store, reproduce, transmit, adapt format, resize, display on authorized devices, and create backup copies as reasonably necessary to operate, secure, improve, and support the Services you choose to use. The license ends when you delete the content and our systems complete deletion, except where retention is required by law or permitted technical backup windows.

You may not use the Services to upload unlawful, defamatory, harassing, hateful, exploitative, or infringing content, or content that violates third-party privacy. You may not use the Services to spam, phish, distribute malware, interfere with servers, scrape our sites in ways that degrade performance, or attempt unauthorized access.

We may remove content or suspend accounts when we reasonably believe these rules are violated or when required by law.

Subscriptions and fees

MyFrame’s public messaging emphasizes no required monthly subscription for normal family photo frame use. If optional subscription features are introduced, they will be presented with clear pricing and renewal rules before purchase.

Warranty and disclaimers

If a limited warranty applies to your product, its terms are provided with the device or in support documentation. Unless required by law, we disclaim all other warranties to the maximum extent permitted, including implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.

Warranty coverage typically excludes misuse, unauthorized repair, accidental damage, exposure to liquids, use with incompatible power supplies, cosmetic wear not affecting function, and damage from external events.

Limitation of liability

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, MyFrame and its affiliates, directors, employees, and suppliers shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, punitive, or exemplary damages, or for loss of profits, data, goodwill, or other intangible losses, arising out of or related to your use of the Services, even if we have been advised of the possibility.

To the fullest extent permitted by law, our aggregate liability for claims arising out of or relating to the Services or any order shall not exceed the greater of (a) the amount you paid to MyFrame for the specific product or service giving rise to the claim during the six months before the claim, or (b) one hundred U.S. dollars (US$100), if no purchase amount applies.

Some jurisdictions do not allow certain limitations; in those jurisdictions our liability is limited to the minimum permitted amount.

Indemnity

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless MyFrame and its affiliates from claims, liabilities, damages, losses, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys’ fees) arising from your content, your misuse of the Services, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of third-party rights.

Dispute resolution and governing law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region, excluding conflict-of-law rules that would choose another jurisdiction’s law, unless mandatory consumer law requires otherwise for you.

Subject to non-waivable rights you may have in your home jurisdiction, you agree that courts located in Hong Kong have exclusive jurisdiction over disputes, unless applicable law requires a different venue for consumers.

If you are a consumer in a region that requires a different dispute process, that mandatory process still applies.

Export controls

You may not export, re-export, or transfer our products or technical data in violation of export control laws, sanctions, or embargoes.

Termination

You may stop using the Services at any time. We may suspend or terminate access if you materially breach these Terms, create risk or legal exposure, or if we discontinue the Services where permitted. Provisions that by nature should survive termination shall survive, including license limits, warranty disclaimers, limitations of liability, indemnity, and dispute terms.

Miscellaneous

These Terms constitute the entire agreement between you and MyFrame regarding the Services and supersede prior oral or written understandings on the same subject. If any provision is invalid, the remainder remains in effect. Our failure to enforce a provision is not a waiver. You may not assign these Terms without our consent; we may assign them in connection with a merger or sale of assets.

Contact

For legal or order questions, use Contact Us or email contact@myframe.ink.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.excerpt: Clear answers for buyers, gift-givers, parents, and families before checkout.

about.title: About MyFrame
about.excerpt: We are a hardware and software company building connected family photo products.
about.body:
MyFrame is a hardware and software company focused on helping families stay emotionally present across distance. We manufacture the MyFrame connected display and provide the supporting tools that make it useful: mobile app, iOS experience, web services, backend management, device pairing, family sharing, and content workflows.

Our work combines product design, embedded hardware, family-friendly software, and e-commerce infrastructure. The result is a manufactured item that feels simple at home, supported by software that makes photo sharing fast for children, couples, parents, and grandparents.

Hardware

Connected MyFrame devices made for family photos, low-maintenance placement, and calm home use.

Software

Mobile, iOS, web, and backend tools for pairing, sending, managing, and supporting family photo experiences.

Our Position

MyFrame is not just another screen. It is a family object: a photo frame, a gift, a memory surface, and a bridge between people who care about each other.

blog.title: Blog
blog.body: Read the latest posts on the Blog.

press-kit.title: Press Kit
press-kit.excerpt: Company background, positioning, approved messaging, boilerplate copy, asset rules, interview topics, and media contacts for MyFrame coverage.
press-kit.body:
About MyFrame

MyFrame is a consumer hardware and software company focused on connected family photo frames. We design colour e-paper displays intended for calm, print-like viewing at home, paired with mobile and cloud tools that make it easy for trusted relatives to send photos without turning the living room into another feed of notifications.

Headquartered in Hong Kong SAR, MyFrame ships products internationally from online channels and supports customers through email, help documentation, and the mobile app experience. The brand message is emotional and practical at the same time: families—especially across distance—deserve a simple way to keep memories visible where people actually live.

What we make

  • Hardware: Connected photo frames using reflective colour e-paper technology, intended for indoor placement, long standby time relative to luminous displays, and gentle visibility under ambient light.
  • Software: Companion mobile applications and cloud services for pairing, account security, album workflows, invitations, playback behavior, diagnostics, and updates.
  • Commerce & support: Official website with checkout, order communication, documentation downloads, help center, and contact workflows for logistics and product questions.

Specific model names, bezel sizes, regional certification marks, and connectivity options may vary by SKU. Always cite model names exactly as shown on the product page or packaging supplied to you.

Positioning and differentiation

  • Private by design: MyFrame emphasizes family-controlled albums rather than public social performance.
  • Home-first experience: The product is meant to sit quietly on a desk, shelf, or wall—not to demand constant interaction.
  • One-time purchase story: Normal family use is positioned around hardware purchase without a required subscription for core photo delivery.
  • Giftability: Strong use cases for parents, grandparents, couples, and long-distance relatives; positioned for birthdays, holidays, weddings, and “thinking of you” moments.

Key messages for journalists

  • “Where family appears.” Photos become part of the room, not only the camera roll.
  • “Built for real homes.” Low-glare e-paper aesthetic, simple daily operation.
  • “Send remotely, enjoy simply.” Younger family members can contribute; recipients are not forced into complex technology tasks.

Suggested short description (≤ 40 words)

MyFrame is a connected colour e-paper photo frame for families who want private albums and calm home viewing. The mobile app pairs the device to Wi-Fi so trusted relatives can send photos to a dedicated display—without another noisy social feed.

Suggested medium description (≈ 120 words)

MyFrame manufactures connected family photo frames that combine colour e-paper displays with mobile apps and secure cloud infrastructure. The product is designed for parents, grandparents, couples, and gift-givers who want meaningful photos visible in the home—not buried on a phone. Setup centers on pairing, Wi-Fi connectivity, and albums that stay within invited family circles. MyFrame emphasizes a paper-like viewing experience suited to living spaces, bedrooms, and desks, alongside straightforward checkout and support through the official website. The company operates internationally from Hong Kong and continues to expand documentation, localization, and retailer stories as new models ship.

Boilerplate (long)

MyFrame designs and delivers connected photo frame hardware and companion software for private household sharing. The ecosystem spans mobile apps, secure backend services, firmware updates, and customer support tools that help families pair devices, curate albums, and troubleshoot connectivity. MyFrame markets its frames as emotionally resonant gifts and everyday household objects—products that make grandchildren, weddings, pets, and ordinary weekends visible on a surface designed for calm, print-like presence rather than continuous backlighting. The business sells through its official online store and communicates product capabilities, shipping expectations, and privacy commitments through policy pages and help center content.

Product facts (check before publishing)

  • Category: Connected digital photo frame; colour e-paper display; family communication hardware.
  • Primary audiences: Families, parents, grandparents, couples, long-distance relatives, gift buyers.
  • Typical channels: Official website, App Store / Google Play listings (region availability may vary), support email, help center articles, downloadable documentation PDF.
  • Company contact: contact@myframe.ink · Contact form
  • Office (communications & operations): RM11, 13/F, BLK C WONG KING IND. BLD., 192-198 CHOI HUNG RD, SAN PO KONG, HONG KONG

Brand assets and visuals

Official logos and product renders are available from the MyFrame website asset paths (for example the header logo served on the homepage). When publishing:

  • Do not stretch, recolor, add effects, or crop the logo in ways that remove clear space.
  • Place the logo on clean backgrounds with sufficient contrast.
  • Use current product photography; avoid mixing outdated bezels or accessories not sold with the quoted SKU.
  • Do not imply endorsement from platforms (Apple, Google, Instagram, etc.) beyond factual statements about app availability where true.

Review units and loaner policy

Media inquiries about review units, photography loans, or briefing calls should include publication name, audience geography, expected publish window, and shipping address requirements. Availability depends on inventory, region, and export considerations.

Interview topics we can speak to

  • E-paper in the home versus traditional LCD photo frames.
  • Designing technology for multi-generational households.
  • Gifting workflows, onboarding for non-technical recipients, and support realities.
  • Privacy model for family albums versus advertising-driven photo products.
  • International logistics, regional power accessories, and certification labeling.

Trademarks

MyFrame and associated logos are trademarks of MyFrame or its affiliates. Third-party names (for example operating system vendors or payment brands) belong to their respective owners.

Media contact

For press requests, partnership discussions, or clarifications on specifications, contact contact@myframe.ink with “Press” in the subject line, or use Contact Us on the official site.

Introductory product video on YouTube (for editorial use when embedding is appropriate): https://youtu.be/_8bVyx_Jiv8

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.excerpt: Product setup, mobile app, pairing, sharing, and support documentation for MyFrame.
documentation.body:
MyFrame is a product line of connected digital photo frames and companion software. This page describes the product experience—not a specific customer project.

What MyFrame is

MyFrame combines e-paper display hardware with mobile and web tools so families can send photos to a dedicated home display. The system is designed around private albums, calm viewing, and simple day-to-day operation.

Quick start (product)

  1. Unbox the MyFrame device and place it on a stable surface.
  2. Power on the frame and keep it within range of your Wi-Fi during setup.
  3. Install the MyFrame mobile app on a smartphone.
  4. Use the app to pair the frame, connect it to Wi-Fi, and create or select a family album.
  5. Send a test photo and confirm it appears on the frame.

Software stack

The product includes mobile apps, secure backend services, and frame firmware for pairing, delivery, and status. Features such as playlists, invited family members, and device diagnostics are exposed through the same product account model.

Hardware notes

Models may differ by size, connectivity, and regional certification. Displays use colour e-paper technology intended for print-like viewing without continuous backlighting. Use only the power accessories supplied or specified for your model.

Care and reliability

  • Indoor use; protect from moisture and extreme heat.
  • Clean the bezel and glass with a soft, dry cloth.
  • If pairing or updates fail repeatedly, power-cycle the frame and retry from the app.

Downloadable documentation

Use the button below for the official MyFrame product documentation (PDF). The file is maintained from the admin panel and can be replaced when product revisions ship.

download-app.title: Download the MyFrame App
download-app.excerpt: Get the MyFrame mobile experience for managing devices and sharing family moments.
download-app.body:
Download the MyFrame mobile app to invite family, send photos, manage albums, and check device status.

  • iOS: search “MyFrame” on the App Store (availability may vary by region).
  • Android: search “MyFrame” on Google Play (availability may vary by region).

Need help? Visit the Help Center or Contact Us.
